title: KosmoPrepare Phase 1 Adapter Fixture Source Package
description: Synthetic, review-only source package connecting the KosmoPrepare phase 1 adapter fixture to the KosmoReferences source-package contract.

notes: All files are synthetic fixture artifacts, but the package remains review-only to preserve the default Kosmo public-ready=0 rule.
This package is a contract bridge only; it does not authorize private source ingestion, OCR, embeddings or training.

sources.title: KosmoPrepare Synthetic HTML Fixture
sources.notes: Repo-safe synthetic HTML used to validate MarkItDown and downstream source-package plumbing.

quality_notes: Converted from the synthetic HTML fixture.
Synthetic IfcOpenShell entity manifest for project/site/building/storey/material semantics.
Machine-readable adapter report with synthetic-only policy assertions.
Human-readable adapter report for Codex, Claude and KosmoOverseer handoff.

candidate_projects.title: KosmoPrepare Phase 1 Synthetic Fixture
evidence: The fixture is synthetic and created inside the repo.
MarkItDown and IfcOpenShell outputs are present with recorded hashes and byte counts.
The package keeps public-ready at zero and does not unlock private source processing.

review_gates.notes: All source and artifact files have SHA-256 and byte counts recorded.
Synthetic fixture only; still review-only by policy.
Converted Markdown contains the intended fixture heading and material/system lines.
HTML fixture has no scanned pages or plan layout blocks.
Maps to a synthetic KosmoPrepare adapter fixture, not to a public architecture entry.
Ifc/material semantics may seed KosmoAsset fixture contracts, but no asset is public-ready.
No private content is read or copied; public-ready remains 0.

next_actions: Use this source-free contract as the bridge before private Source Root activation.
